summary: External signoff pack exists and includes provider provisioning, backup/rollback, live restore, and boss/operations approval sections.

commands.command: test -s docs/devpilot/external-signoff-pack.md && rg -n --max-count 30 'Provider And Resource Provisioning|Production Backup And Rollback Rehearsal|Live Restore Approval|Boss / Operations Approval Checklist|production_like_ready_external_signoff_required' docs/devpilot/external-signoff-pack.md
